ValidationRule.description: prevent CTBR users from editing the dealer, customer or competitor account name with exceptions.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Name), OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Dealer", $Profile.Name <> "CTBR Customer Master Responsible" ) , OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Customer", RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Competitor" )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to modify this Account Name.
